questions.question: When you touch or feed a tiny newborn baby, what is one simple thing you should always do first to keep the baby safe?
sounds_right: pehle haath dhona hai sabun se
haath saaf karke hi bacche ko uthana
koi kaam se aake seedha nhi, pehle haath dhounga/dhoungi
sounds_confused: thoda sa tel laga ke hi pakadna hai
nahi, newborn ko kuch karne ki zaroorat nahi, waise hi utha lo

questions.question: A neighbour tells you to give a newborn some pani or ghutti. For the first months, what should the baby mostly drink?
sounds_right: sirf maa ka doodh dena hai
doctor bole to powder doodh, warna maa ka doodh hi
pani ya ghutti nahi, bas maa ka dudh
sounds_confused: thoda pani to dena hi padta hai garami me
subah ghutti, baad me maa ka doodh

questions.question: If 3–4 small children come to your house every morning, how can you start a simple daily routine so they feel safe and enjoy?
sounds_right: roz aane pe bag rakhenge, haath dhoyenge, phir khelne dena
pehle free khel, fir thoda kaam jaise drawing, fir geet sunaungi
har din same time pe khelna, khana, sone ka rakhungi
sounds_confused: jo marzi kare, kabhi bhi, routine ki kya zaroorat
roz naya kuch bina soche, kabhi khilao kabhi mat khilao

questions.question: What is one small zimmedari (responsibility) you can give to slightly older kids in your daycare, like they do in big schools?
sounds_right: bada bacha apna bag aur joota khud rakhe
bade bachche ko bol sakte toys jama karo sab
vo paani ka glass chota bache ko pakda de
sounds_confused: sab ka kaam main hi karu, bachchon se kuch nahi karwana
bade bache se bartan dhulwana, jhaadu lagwana pura ghar

questions.question: Before children sit to eat at your home daycare, what is one habit you will follow every time?
sounds_right: pehle haath dhulwana sabke
ek jagah bitha ke fir khilana
sabko khana deke fir start karenge
sounds_confused: jo kha raha hai kha le, haath dhona zaruri nahi
bacha bhaagte bhaagte bhi khaye to chalta hai

questions.question: How can you make children wait and start eating together in a nice way, not fighting over food?
sounds_right: bolungi sab aajaye, ek saath bolenge chalo khaate hain phir shuru
pehle sabki plate bhar ke, fir signal dungi ab khaao
geet ga ke bolungi sab ready? fir start
sounds_confused: jo pehle plate pakde vo kha le, baaki baad me
ek ko de do, dusra roye to ro ne do

questions.question: In the room where children will play, what dangerous things should you remove or keep high so they can’t touch?
sounds_right: chaaku, dawai, phenyl sab upar rakhna
kerosene, matchis door rakhni
chhoti chhoti cheeze jaise sikka, moti hata dena
sounds_confused: sab cheeze wahi rehne do, main dekh lungi
bus khidki band kar do, baaki sab theek hai

questions.question: How will you use the idea of ‘shoes outside’ to keep your play corner cleaner for babies?
sounds_right: bahar gate pe joota chappal utarwaungi
andar sirf saaf chappal ya nange pair bacha aayega
andar ka mat saaf rahe isliye joota bahar rakhenge
sounds_confused: andar bhi khet wala joota pehen ke aane do
sirf bade log joota utare, bachche kuch bhi kare

questions.question: When a parent comes in the evening to take their child, what are two small things you can tell them about the child’s day?
sounds_right: batana ki kya khela, khana khaya ya nahi
bola sakti ho ki kitna soya, susu potty theek tha
agar ro raha tha ya bukhar tha to bataungi
sounds_confused: kuch batane ki zaroorat nahi, bas bacha de do
sirf paise ki baat karni hai, bacche ke bare me nahi

questions.question: In the morning, what is one simple sawaal you can ask parents so you know how to care for the child that day?
sounds_right: poochungi raat ko bacha thik tha? bukhar to nahi
koi dawai chal rahi hai kya?
aaj khana ghar se kya laaya hai?
sounds_confused: kuch mat puchho, bas le lo bacha
sirf fees puchhna hai, aur kuch nahi

questions.question: If you start a home daycare, why is it better to take only as many children as you can safely watch?
sounds_right: zyada bache lenge to sambhal nahi paungi, danger ho jayega
3–4 se zyada hogaya to nazar nahi rahegi sab pe
thoda kam bache rakho par achchhe se dekh bhale se
sounds_confused: jitne aajayen sab le lo, paise zyada milenge, dekhbhal baad me
jitne bache ho, sabko TV chalu karke bitha do, khud kuch mat karo

questions.question: How can you find your first 1–2 paying children for your daycare in your own village or basti?
sounds_right: padosi aur rishtedaar didi se baat karungi
mahila group me bataungi ki main bacche sambhalti hoon
anganwadi wali se bolungi kisi ko zarurat ho to mera naam de
sounds_confused: sirf shehar ke logon ka wait karungi
kisi ko batane ki zaroorat nahi, khud hi dekh lenge
